race.comment: ZAMORA (3) pushed forward last time and boxed on to finish second over 1100m at Ararat. Will be looking to cross and steady the tempo. Right in this. Expected to take running down. QUEUE JUMPER (4) was well fancied on the back of a couple of minor placings but could only manage seventh last start over 1100m at Wangaratta. Has good early speed so should take up a forward position. Expecting a bold showing. DUBAI FOUNTAIN (5) scored two back at Kyneton but was below her best last time when eighth over 1450m at Kilmore. Likely improver with top-three prospects. SWEET 'N' SPICY (6) resumes from a spell of three-and-a-half months and is having her first outing under new trainer Helen Burns. Finished sixth at Mornington over 1200m at the opening run last time in work. Well-placed and is among the chances. SHELLY'S LEGACY (1) has been placed at two of three second-up runs and goes well here, so he's got a couple of things in his favour.
